chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Revision Application No.S-70 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 04.11.2025 None present for the applicants. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Applicants were convicted vide judgment dated 18-05-2024 passed in Criminal Case No. 132/ 2023, arising out of FIR No.60/ 2023 of P.S Perumal for offence under section 5,8(i) of Sindh Prohibition of Preparation, Manufacturing, Storage, Sale and Use of Gutka and Manpuri Act, 2019 by learned Civil Judge and J.M-III, Sanghar, and sentenced them to suffer simple imprisonment for one year and to pay fine of Rs.200,000/= each; in case of default in payment of fine to undergo six months more. However, benefit of section 382-B Cr.P.C was extended to the applicants. The applicants preferred appeal against said judgment, which was dismissed by learned appellate court and maintained the judgment passed by learned trial court vide judgment dated 30-07-2025; hence this Criminal Revision application. Since filing of this Revision application none appeared on behalf of the applicants, therefore, Jail Roll(s) of the applicants was called from the concerned Jail Superintendent, which have been received, which reveal that applicants Muhammad Hassan s/o Molvi Muhammad Qasim Pathan, Zahir Khan s/o Nadir khan Pathan, Abdul Malik s/o Pasand Khan Brohi and Abdul Hafeez s/o Abdul Raheem Brohi have been released from Central Prison, Mirpurkhas on 01-09-2025 and 25-09-2025 respectively on completion of sentence on remission system and payment

The applicants preferred appeal against said judgment, which was dismissed by learned appellate court and maintained the judgment passed by learned trial court vide judgment dated 30-07-2025; hence this Criminal Revision application. Since filing of this Revision application none appeared on behalf of the applicants, therefore, Jail Roll(s) of the applicants was called from the concerned Jail Superintendent, which have been received, which reveal that applicants Muhammad Hassan s/o Molvi Muhammad Qasim Pathan, Zahir Khan s/o Nadir khan Pathan, Abdul Malik s/o Pasand Khan Brohi and Abdul Hafeez s/o Abdul Raheem Brohi have been released from Central Prison, Mirpurkhas on 01-09-2025 and 25-09-2025 respectively on completion of sentence on remission system and payment of fine. It is a matter of record that applicants after release neither approached this court to contest their case on merits nor their counsel appeared, which reveals that they have lost their interest to pursue this Revision application, therefore, same is dismissed having become infructuous. JUDGE “Saleem”
